holdings.infoBox: PBW is an equity ETF with a total of 71 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hyliion Holdings stock at 4.60%, Navitas Semiconductor at 3.01%, FuelCell Energy at 2.98%, Aspen Aerogels at 2.14%, and Bloom Energy at 2.13%.

overview.description: The Invesco WilderHill Clean Energy ETF (PBW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the The WilderHill Clean Energy (AMEX) index. The fund tracks a modified equal-weighted index of companies involved in cleaner energy sources or energy conservation. PBW was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
